articles.title: BRICS Eye Stablecoin Launch To Reduce The Influence Of The US Dollar — Will Ripple’s XRP Be Utilized?
articles.description: The BRICS consortium has indicated a keen interest in rolling out a stablecoin for international settlements amid an ambitious plan to whittle down the influence of the greenback.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton's Ethereum ETF Listing Raises Hopes for SEC Approval
articles.description: Franklin Templeton's proposed Ethereum ETF makes the DTCC list, sparking hope for easier investor access, though faces uncertain SEC approval.
